info.title: IntentCenter API
info.description: IntentCenter — DCIM, IPAM, circuits, automation, and closed-loop inventory (clean-room derived). Read-only GraphQL at /graphql.

post.description:
Run the same HTTP probe as connector.sync without writing health columns.
Use connectorId to test a saved row, or omit it and pass type + settings (and optional credentials) for a draft.

post.description: Verify OpenAI-compatible /chat/completions with current or draft values (admin only).

schema.title: Body
Response Post Admin Llm Test V1 Admin Llm Test Post

Body
Response Post Copilot Chat V1 Copilot Chat Post

post.description:
Server-sent events: each line is ``data: <json>`` with types ``delta``, ``status``,
``error``, and ``done``. Client should accumulate ``delta`` text for the assistant message.

schema.title: Body

post.description:
LLM-suggested column mapping for bulk import (read-only: returns JSON only).
Body: ``targetResourceType`` (e.g. Device), ``columns`` (string[]), ``sampleRows`` (array of row objects, optional).

schema.title: Body
Response Post Copilot Assist Import Mapping V1 Copilot Assist Import Mapping Post

post.description:
Pasted ticket/incident: extract hostnames/IPs, search inventory; optional LLM summary.
Body: ``text`` (string), ``summarize`` (optional bool, default true if LLM available).

schema.title: Body
Response Post Copilot Assist Ticket Triage V1 Copilot Assist Ticket Triage Post

post.description:
Suggest a short display title for a chat after the first user+assistant turn.
Returns { "title": str | null }; null if LLM is unavailable or generation fails.

schema.title: Body
Response Post Suggest Thread Title V1 Copilot Suggest Thread Title Post

post.description:
Three “where to go next” chip options: current app page (server-enriched) plus recent chat.
Uses the LLM when configured; otherwise (or if the model returns empty or unparseable JSON) returns
deterministic `suggestions` so the UI always has follow-ups to show.

schema.title: Body
Response Post Suggest Next Steps V1 Copilot Suggest Next Steps Post

post.description:
Text-only completion using the target org's effective LLM (no tools). For workers and extension runtimes.
Headers: ``X-Nims-Internal-Key``, ``X-Organization-Id`` (UUID).
Body: ``{ "messages": [ { "role": "system"|"user"|"assistant", "content": "..." } ], "maxTokens"?: int, "temperature"?: float }``

Full Path

CircuitSegmentCreate.title: CircuitSegmentCreate
CircuitSegmentCreate.description: Add a leg to a multi-segment circuit. Omit segmentIndex to append after the last leg.

ConnectorTestBody.title: ConnectorTestBody
ConnectorTestBody.description: Test an existing registration or a draft (unsaved) connector configuration.

status.title: Status
status.description: Lifecycle status; server defaults to PLANNED if omitted on create.

target.title: Target
target.description: Directory to probe: bind for LDAP, OpenID metadata for Entra and OIDC.

overrides.title: Overrides
overrides.description: Unsaved form values (same key names as PATCH for that provider; merged with stored when not env-locked).

parentId.title: Parentid
parentId.description: Parent location in the org hierarchy, if any.

latitude.title: Latitude
latitude.description: WGS84; must be paired with longitude.

longitude.title: Longitude
longitude.description: WGS84; must be paired with latitude.

locationId.title: Locationid
locationId.description: Rack is placed in this org-scoped location.

uHeight.title: Uheight
uHeight.description: Rack height in U; defaults to 42 on the server if omitted.

locationId.title: Locationid
locationId.description: Relocate the rack to another site/room.
